def positive_module_exposes_mutable_singleton_client():
    rule_id = "module_exposes_mutable_singleton_client"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag modules that export long-lived mutable client instances for direct cross-module mutation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
